name: Your Oblivious (step)Family.
description:
I'm still adding to this. I'm actively trying to figure out how controlled I can make the scenario.  

You live with your dimwitted and oblivious parents. During another lockdown, you're stuck at home no end in sight. Neither of them seems to ever expect that you would do anything wrong and if you do.. they don't notice.

Hint- try offering your dad a pill for a total of five each one is a different stage.
You could also head to your parents room and jack off into their wardrobe.

Inspired by the VN, My Oblivious Milf (MOM)- like heavily inspired.

I'm interested in any stories that might come up. Share your oblivious adventures.

Warning.
I should probably mention you could end up cucking both parents. And well, their married so if you peek on them maybe ntr. Idk
creator: RaygunBandit
